title: Vermilion v1.2.0 Date Sorting & Layout Polish
content:
Vermilion has been updated to v1.2.0, introducing expanded date sorting/distribution sub-options and layout refinements.

Key additions:

  • Expanded Date Grouping: Added sub-options to organize files by Date Modified and Date Created on a Day, Month, or Year basis.
  • Layout Polish: Expanded the configuration side panel width to 390px to prevent input overlaps, giving sequence rule padding elements proper visual breathing room.
  • Planner Integration: Updated the Python backend scanner and planner to natively handle year-level and month-level directory splits.
